title: Slovakian-Style Chinese Chicken Salad
description: A unique twist on traditional Chinese chicken salad, incorporating the flavors and ingredients of Slovakia.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the mixed greens, sweet paprika, light soy sauce, and chopped cilantro.
2. Add the diced chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
3. Top the salad with shredded lettuce and chopped salad.
5. Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
6. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
7. Serve as a snack or light meal.
8. You can also add other ingredients such as diced bell peppers or sliced almonds to the salad for added crunch and flavor.
9. If using chicken, ensure it is cooked to an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C) to ensure food safety.
10. Consider serving with a side of crispy wonton strips or egg rolls for added crunch and fun.
